query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS swot_analyses (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  businessEntityId INT,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  status ENUM('draft', 'active', 'archived') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL,
  analysisDate TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  reviewDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  strengthScore INT DEFAULT 0,
  weaknessScore INT DEFAULT 0,
  opportunityScore INT DEFAULT 0,
  threatScore INT DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS swot_items (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  swotAnalysisId INT NOT NULL,
  category ENUM('strength', 'weakness', 'opportunity', 'threat') NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  priority ENUM('low', 'medium', 'high', 'critical') DEFAULT 'medium' NOT NULL,
  impact INT DEFAULT 5,
  actionRequired BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  actionPlan TEXT,
  actionStatus ENUM('pending', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'pending',
  actionDueDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  sortOrder INT DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
